name: tech-launch
theme_reason: Use the official seriph theme as the default baseline for stronger editorial/product-launch presentation energy.
typography: hero-led launch deck with restrained supporting copy
background_rule: dark base canvas with bright accent lines and sparse surfaces
emphasis_rule: use one neon accent and one muted surface family to create stage-like contrast
panel_classes: rounded-3xl border border-slate-800/80 bg-slate-900/82 shadow-2xl shadow-cyan-950/20
anti_patterns: flat report tables with no visual framing
